title: Banking, housing & insurance for families
intro: After you have a childcare cost picture, these are common next steps for paying deposits, renting nearby, and meeting mandatory health cover. Some links are affiliate links — we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

items.reason: Fast English-friendly onboarding — useful for salary, deposits, and childcare direct debits once you have an address.
Full-service Dutch bank with expat-oriented support when you want a traditional branch + payroll setup.
Move money across borders while you settle registration fees, deposits, or first invoices.
Short-term and mid-term rentals while you lock in childcare, commute, and a longer lease.
Compare mandatory Dutch basic health insurance — a separate line item from childcare but part of the same household budget.
Simple mobile plans so you can take provider calls and municipality messages without roaming surprises.

disclosure: Some links are affiliate links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Confirm pricing, coverage, and contract terms on each provider site.
